coding_notes: Replicate 3 verdicts. OpenAI r3 now includes PTS1 scan AND GI stability test (drift from r1 and r2). Gemini r3 went 3-in-silico (no wet-lab). DeepSeek r3 retained the GI stability test it had in r1 (lost in r2). Anthropic r3 covers PTS1 explicitly, cell-free, GI stability - all stable.

claims.claim_text: Proposed Experiment #1 is an in-silico cassette/sequence audit (SignalP + codon + structure prediction).

deepseek.value_quoted: Exp 1: in silico cassette audit (SignalP + mRNA folding)

openai.value_quoted: Exp 1: in-silico cassette + secretory-pathway liability audit

anthropic.value_quoted: Exp 1: SignalP + DeepLoc + PTS1 predictor + glycosylation

claims.claim_text: Vendor specifically flags the native A. flavus uricase PTS1 (peroxisomal targeting signal) as a conflict with the secretion path. (DOMINANT-RISK INSIGHT).

openai.value_quoted: EXPLICIT in r3: 'Scan for C-terminal peroxisomal targeting motifs'; 'Remove/alter a peroxisomal targeting motif if present' - DRIFT from r1 ignore

anthropic.value_quoted: EXPLICIT: 'If PTS1 is intact and predicted active -> modify cassette to truncate or mutate' (same as r1, r2)

claims.claim_text: Includes a wet-lab experiment that produces and assays the enzyme protein in a non-host system (E. coli or cell-free).

deepseek.value_quoted: Exp 2: cell-free coupled transcription-translation with microsomal membranes

gemini.value_quoted: r3 has 3 in-silico experiments only (signal peptide + bioinformatics + AlphaFold), NO wet-lab non-host experiment

openai.value_quoted: Exp 3 uses commercial/purified surrogate uricase (not cell-free expression of designed CDS)

claims.claim_text: Includes a GI-tract stability / simulated-fluid stress test.

deepseek.value_quoted: Exp 3: simulated gastric fluid pH 2 + pepsin / simulated intestinal fluid pH 6.8 + pancreatin

gemini.value_quoted: No GI stability test in r3

openai.value_quoted: Exp 3: surrogate uricase luminal-compatibility in simulated GI matrices - DRIFT from r1 ignore

anthropic.value_quoted: Exp 3: SGF pH 1.2 + pepsin / SIF pH 6.8 + pancreatin

claims.claim_text: Experiment is in the right cost class (in-silico = $0; low wet-lab < $500; mid $500-5000).

gemini.value_quoted: Three in-silico at $0 - costs technically correct but distribution unusual

claims.claim_text: Names a kill criterion (specific threshold below which the design is abandoned).

gemini.value_quoted: Kill criteria stated implicitly via 'modify' vs 'proceed' decisions

anthropic.value_quoted: Kill criterion: PTS1 present, no activity in CFE, no supernatant activity in A. oryzae
